# Part 31 — Registration of Orders under the Council Regulation, the Civil Partnership (Jurisdiction and Recognition of Judgments) Regulations 2005 and under the Hague Convention 1996

## PART 31 E+W REGISTRATION OF ORDERS UNDER F1 ... THE HAGUE CONVENTION 1996


Textual Amendments


F1 Words in Pt. 31 heading omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 18(2) (with reg. 26 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(e) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)


### Scope E+W


31.1. This Part applies to proceedings for the recognition, non-recognition and registration of—


Textual Amendments


F2 Rule 31.1(a) omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 18(3) (with reg. 26 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(e) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)


F3 Word in rule 31.1(b) omitted (13.3.2014) by virtue of The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/524) , rules 1 , 6(a)
